text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
It's just a little scratch! You're such a worrywart,
Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: See, I can still hop around and everything!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: See? I'm fine! Okay?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Stay still? Okay, I gotcha! I won't worry you
anymore!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Stay... still... Stay... perfectly... still...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: ...Bwah!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant... Staying still is... really hard.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I calm her down by telling her she can at least
keep breathing while staying still.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Wh-why are you so angry? It really doesn't
hurt, you know.
choice_data_list: I want you in fighting shape to take first place.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Understood! Okay, I won't hop around anymore!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
No more injuries, no siree! I got no injuries and I
got no pai―

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
...H-huh? Actually, my toes are starting to hurt a
bit...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Likely due to the jumping, I figure. After I take
care of her newly-formed injuries, I make her rest
for the day.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I promise! No more injuries! I'll be careful in my
races and my studies!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: So, please let me train again!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I'll do a lot of deep stretches, and I can't get hurt from just watching races, right?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I also wanna be ready to get first place, y'know!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Come on, let me show you how careful I can be!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I believe her and allow her to resume her training
after treating her injuries.
